message.content:
Fix all shellcheck findings in `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/crgv.validate.sh`. There are 28 findings:
- SC2086 (Double quote to prevent globbing): lines 43, 44, 63, 64, 86, 87, 119 (x4), 130 (x4), 139, 148, 157, 166, 175, 184, 193 (x2), 202 (x2), 215, 229, 243
- SC2046 (Quote command substitution to prevent word splitting): lines 67, 90, 139, 148, 157, 166, 175, 184, 215, 229, 243

For SC2086: wrap unquoted variables in double quotes, e.g. `$var` → `"${var}"` or `${var}` → `"${var}"`
For SC2046: wrap `$(...)` command substitutions in double quotes, e.g. `$(cmd)` → `"$(cmd)"`

Read the file first, then apply the fixes. Make sure to preserve the logic — just add quotes.

    19→# Configuration Regime Validate Library
    20→
    21→# Core error handling
    22→crgv_print_and_die() {
    23→    echo "ERROR: $*" >&2
    24→    exit 1
    25→}
    26→
    27→# String validator with optional length constraints
    28→crgv_string() {
    29→    local context=$1
    30→    local varname=$2
    31→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    32→    local min=$3
    33→    local max=$4
    34→
    35→    # Allow empty if min=0
    36→    test "$min" != "0" -o -n "$val" || return 0
    37→
    38→    # Otherwise must not be empty
    39→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    40→
    41→    # Check length constraints if max provided
    42→    if [ -n "$max" ]; then
    43→        test ${#val} -ge $min || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    44→        test ${#val} -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    45→    fi
    46→}
    47→
    48→# Cross-context name validator (system-safe identifier)
    49→crgv_xname() {
    50→    local context=$1
    51→    local varname=$2
    52→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    53→    local min=$3
    54→    local max=$4
    55→
    56→    # Allow empty if min=0
    57→    test "$min" != "0" -o -n "$val" || return 0
    58→
    59→    # Otherwise must not be empty
    60→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    61→
    62→    # Check length constraints
    63→    test ${#val} -ge $min || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    64→    test ${#val} -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    65→
    66→    # Must start with letter and contain only allowed chars
    67→    test $(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$') || \
    68→        crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must start with letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen, got '$val'"
    69→}
    70→
    71→# Fully Qualified Image Name component validator
    72→crgv_fqin() {
    73→    local context=$1
    74→    local varname=$2
    75→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    76→    local min=$3
    77→    local max=$4
    78→
    79→    # Allow empty if min=0
    80→    test "$min" != "0" -o -n "$val" || return 0
    81→
    82→    # Otherwise must not be empty
    83→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    84→
    85→    # Check length constraints
    86→    test ${#val} -ge $min || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    87→    test ${#val} -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    88→
    89→    # Allow letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, underscores, forward slashes, colons
    90→    test $(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9:._/-]*$') || \
    91→        crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must start with letter/number and contain only letters, numbers, colons, dots, underscores, hyphens, forward slashes, got '$val'"
    92→}
    93→
    94→crgv_bool() {
    95→    local context=$1
    96→    local varname=$2
    97→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    98→
    99→    test "$val" = "0" -o "$val" = "1" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be 0 or 1, got: '$val'"
   100→}
   101→
   102→crgv_opt_bool() {
   103→    local context=$1
   104→    local varname=$2
   105→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   106→
   107→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   108→    test "$val" = "0" -o "$val" = "1" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be 0 or 1, got: '$val'"
   109→}
   110→
   111→crgv_decimal() {
   112→    local context=$1
   113→    local varname=$2
   114→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   115→    local min=$3

   119→    test $val -ge $min -a $val -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between $min and $max"
   120→}
   121→
   122→crgv_opt_range() {
   123→    local context=$1
   124→    local varname=$2
   125→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   126→    local min=$3

   128→
   129→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   130→    test $val -ge $min -a $val -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between $min and $max"
   131→}
   132→
   133→crgv_ipv4() {
   134→    local context=$1

   140→}
   141→
   142→crgv_opt_ipv4() {
   143→    local context=$1
   144→    local varname=$2
   145→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   146→
   147→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   148→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid IPv4 format: '$val'"
   149→}
   150→
   151→crgv_cidr() {
   152→    local context=$1
   153→    local varname=$2
   154→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   155→

   157→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/[0-9]{1,2}$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid CIDR format: '$val'"
   158→}
   159→
   160→crgv_opt_cidr() {
   161→    local context=$1
   162→    local varname=$2
   163→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   164→
   165→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   166→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/[0-9]{1,2}$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid CIDR format: '$val'"
   167→}
   168→
   169→crgv_domain() {
   170→    local context=$1
   171→    local varname=$2
   172→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   173→
   174→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   175→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\.-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid domain format: '$val'"
   176→}
   177→
   178→crgv_opt_domain() {

   180→    local varname=$2
   181→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   182→
   183→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   184→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\.-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid domain format: '$val'"
   185→}
   186→
   187→crgv_port() {
   188→    local context=$1
   189→    local varname=$2
   190→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   191→
   192→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   193→    test $val -ge 1 -a $val -le 65535 || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between 1 and 65535"
   194→}

   203→}
   204→
   205→crgv_list_ipv4() {

   209→
   210→    test -n "$val" || return 0  # Empty lists allowed
   211→
   212→    local item_num=0
   213→    for item in $val; do

   230→    done

   244→    done
   245→}

input.old_string:
test ${#val} -ge $min || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
        test ${#val} -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    fi
}

# Cross-context name validator (system-safe identifier)
crgv_xname() {
    local context=$1
    local varname=$2
    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    local min=$3
    local max=$4

    # Allow empty if min=0
    test "$min" != "0" -o -n "$val" || return 0

    # Otherwise must not be empty
    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"

    # Check length constraints
    test ${#val} -ge $min || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    test ${#val} -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"

    # Must start with letter and contain only allowed chars
    test $(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$') || \
        crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must start with letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen, got '$val'"
}
input.new_string:

        test ${#val} -le "$max" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    fi
}

    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    local min=$3
    local max=$4

    # Allow empty if min=0
    test "$min" != "0" -o -n "$val" || return 0

    # Otherwise must not be empty

    # Check length constraints
    test ${#val} -ge "$min" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    test ${#val} -le "$max" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"

    # Must start with letter and contain only allowed chars
    test "$(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$')" || \
        crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must start with letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen, got '$val'"
}

    22→crgv_print_and_die() {
    23→    echo "ERROR: $*" >&2
    24→    exit 1

    26→
    27→# String validator with optional length constraints
    28→crgv_string() {
    29→    local context=$1

    31→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    32→    local min=$3

    36→    test "$min" != "0" -o -n "$val" || return 0

    39→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    40→
    41→    # Check length constraints if max provided
    42→    if [ -n "$max" ]; then
    43→        test ${#val} -ge "$min" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    44→        test ${#val} -le "$max" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    45→    fi
    46→}
    47→
    48→# Cross-context name validator (system-safe identifier)
    49→crgv_xname() {
    50→    local context=$1
    51→    local varname=$2
    52→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    53→    local min=$3
    54→    local max=$4
    55→
    56→    # Allow empty if min=0
    57→    test "$min" != "0" -o -n "$val" || return 0
    58→
    59→    # Otherwise must not be empty
    60→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    61→
    62→    # Check length constraints
    63→    test ${#val} -ge "$min" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    64→    test ${#val} -le "$max" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    65→
    66→    # Must start with letter and contain only allowed chars
    67→    test "$(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$')" || \
    68→        crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must start with letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen, got '$val'"
    69→}
    70→
    71→# Fully Qualified Image Name component validator
    72→crgv_fqin() {
    73→    local context=$1
    74→    local varname=$2
    75→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    76→    local min=$3
    77→    local max=$4
    78→
    79→    # Allow empty if min=0
    80→    test "$min" != "0" -o -n "$val" || return 0
    81→
    82→    # Otherwise must not be empty
    83→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    84→
    85→    # Check length constraints
    86→    test ${#val} -ge "$min" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    87→    test ${#val} -le "$max" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    88→
    89→    # Allow letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, underscores, forward slashes, colons
    90→    test "$(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9:._/-]*$')" || \
    91→        crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must start with letter/number and contain only letters, numbers, colons, dots, underscores, hyphens, forward slashes, got '$val'"
    92→}
    93→
    94→crgv_bool() {
    95→    local context=$1
    96→    local varname=$2
    97→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    98→
    99→    test "$val" = "0" -o "$val" = "1" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be 0 or 1, got: '$val'"
   100→}
   101→
   102→crgv_opt_bool() {
   103→    local context=$1
   104→    local varname=$2
   105→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   106→
   107→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   108→    test "$val" = "0" -o "$val" = "1" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be 0 or 1, got: '$val'"
   109→}
   110→
   111→crgv_decimal() {
   112→    local context=$1
   113→    local varname=$2
   114→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   115→    local min=$3
   116→    local max=$4
   117→
   118→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   119→    test "$val" -ge "$min" -a "$val" -le "$max" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between $min and $max"
   120→}
   121→
   122→crgv_opt_range() {
   123→    local context=$1
   124→    local varname=$2
   125→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   126→    local min=$3
   127→    local max=$4
   128→
   129→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   130→    test "$val" -ge "$min" -a "$val" -le "$max" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between $min and $max"
   131→}
   132→
   133→crgv_ipv4() {
   134→    local context=$1
   135→    local varname=$2
   136→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   137→
   138→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   139→    test "$(echo "$val" | grep -E '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$')" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid IPv4 format: '$val'"
   140→}
   141→
   142→crgv_opt_ipv4() {
   143→    local context=$1
   144→    local varname=$2
   145→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   146→
   147→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   148→    test "$(echo "$val" | grep -E '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$')" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid IPv4 format: '$val'"
   149→}
   150→
   151→crgv_cidr() {
   152→    local context=$1
   153→    local varname=$2
   154→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   155→
   156→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   157→    test "$(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/[0-9]{1,2}$')" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid CIDR format: '$val'"
   158→}
   159→
   160→crgv_opt_cidr() {
   161→    local context=$1
   162→    local varname=$2
   163→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   164→
   165→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   166→    test "$(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/[0-9]{1,2}$')" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid CIDR format: '$val'"
   167→}
   168→
   169→crgv_domain() {
   170→    local context=$1
   171→    local varname=$2
   172→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   173→
   174→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   175→    test "$(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\.-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$')" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid domain format: '$val'"
   176→}
   177→
   178→crgv_opt_domain() {
   179→    local context=$1
   180→    local varname=$2
   181→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   182→
   183→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   184→    test "$(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\.-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$')" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid domain format: '$val'"
   185→}
   186→
   187→crgv_port() {
   188→    local context=$1
   189→    local varname=$2
   190→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   191→
   192→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   193→    test "$val" -ge 1 -a "$val" -le 65535 || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between 1 and 65535"
   194→}
   195→
   196→crgv_opt_port() {
   197→    local context=$1
   198→    local varname=$2
   199→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   200→
   201→    test -n "$val" || return 0
   202→    test "$val" -ge 1 -a "$val" -le 65535 || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between 1 and 65535"
   203→}
   204→
   205→crgv_list_ipv4() {
   206→    local context=$1
   207→    local varname=$2
   208→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   209→
   210→    test -n "$val" || return 0  # Empty lists allowed
   211→
   212→    local item_num=0
   213→    for item in $val; do
   214→        item_num=$((item_num + 1))
   215→        test "$(echo "$item" | grep -E '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$')" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname item #$item_num has invalid IPv4 format: '$item'"
   216→    done

   223→
   224→    test -n "$val" || return 0  # Empty lists allowed
   225→
   226→    local item_num=0
   227→    for item in $val; do
   228→        item_num=$((item_num + 1))
   229→        test "$(echo "$item" | grep -E '^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/[0-9]{1,2}$')" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname item #$item_num has invalid CIDR format: '$item'"
   230→    done
   231→}
   232→
   233→crgv_list_domain() {
   234→    local context=$1
   235→    local varname=$2
   236→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   237→
   238→    test -n "$val" || return 0  # Empty lists allowed
   239→
   240→    local item_num=0
   241→    for item in $val; do
   242→        item_num=$((item_num + 1))
   243→        test "$(echo "$item" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\.-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$')" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname item #$item_num has invalid domain format: '$item'"
   244→    done
   245→}
   246→
   247→# eof

content.text:
All 28 shellcheck findings have been fixed in `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/crgv.validate.sh`. Here is a summary of what was changed:

**SC2086 fixes (double-quoting variables)** -- 23 instances:
- Lines 43, 44: `$min` and `$max` in `crgv_string` quoted
- Lines 63, 64: `$min` and `$max` in `crgv_xname` quoted
- Lines 86, 87: `$min` and `$max` in `crgv_fqin` quoted
- Line 119: `$val`, `$min`, `$max` in `crgv_decimal` quoted (4 vars on one line)
- Line 130: `$val`, `$min`, `$max` in `crgv_opt_range` quoted (4 vars on one line)
- Lines 139, 148, 157, 166, 175, 184: `$val` in echo commands within grep pipelines quoted
- Lines 193, 202: `$val` in `crgv_port` and `crgv_opt_port` quoted
- Lines 215, 229, 243: `$item` in echo commands within list validators quoted

**SC2046 fixes (quoting command substitutions)** -- 11 instances:
- Lines 67, 90: `$(echo ... | grep ...)` wrapped in double quotes in `crgv_xname` and `crgv_fqin`
- Lines 139, 148, 157, 166, 175, 184: `$(echo ... | grep ...)` wrapped in double quotes in ipv4/cidr/domain validators
- Lines 215, 229, 243: `$(echo ... | grep ...)` wrapped in double quotes in list validators

All changes are purely quoting additions -- no logic was altered.
